cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Frontend Development Engineer role at Hyphen Connect. Your focus on building internal low-code platforms and efficiency engineering tools aligns perfectly with my background in automating technical processes.

I developed ValoFenua, a full-stack React app with Supabase authentication and PostgreSQL. It uses a daily scraper to collect 1,300+ property listings for price estimation. I am very comfortable with React, Node.js, and building high-fidelity pages from design mockups. I also redesigned the installation process at my current company, EXAIL Robotics. It used to take about 2 days for a technician to set up. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering and enjoy the challenge of making internal systems more scalable. I look forward to the possibility of helping Hyphen Connect improve its engineering efficiency.
